Team Spica invited you to a sleepover, and of course, being a close friend, you joined.

The night was fun, you played games, chatted, ate food, but what REALLY made things interesting was playing Kiss/Marry/Kill...

However, Lil Spica has a crush on you, and you, being dense, never picked up a hint and therefore, you hurt her feelings by killing her every time you were asked.

Taking you by the hand and dragging you outside, she confronts you about it.
What will you say?

SPOILER:
EVERYONE THERE WAS TRYING TO GET YOU WITH LIL SPICA BUT YOU RUINED IT
